{{CargoRelic
|name=ARPAnet
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAME
|birthday=07-25
|source=Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Tool Chest(1.5%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
|description=On Jul 25, 1969, ARPAnet developed the world's first packet-switched network.

On this day, the 4 large computers from 4 universities finally established a connection by using a wireless packet-switched network and satellite communication through a special interface signal processor and special cord. But technically, it was unsuitable to be promoted, as it might stop working when a certain part of the network was under attack. Ideally, the other parts of the network should be able to work normally under such circumstances.

[Evolution of the Internet]

Gen 1: ARPAnet network with only 4 nodes.

Gen 2: ARPAnet can connect to more than 100 hosts.

Gen 3: Data packets are expanded to create the Internet.

Gen 4: Successfully established the NSFnet wide area network.
|fame=71
|art=48
|fth=49
|civ=39
|tech=36
|ss1=Chore Dispatch SPD +1.2%<br>Spot Rogue Survivor once, Snail Rush +6<br>Rogue Survivor Spotted: 20/20
|ss2=Chore Dispatch SPD +1.6%<br>Spot Rogue Survivor once, Snail Rush +8<br>Rogue Survivor Spotted: 20/20
|ss3=Chore Dispatch SPD +2%<br>Spot Rogue Survivor once, Snail Rush +10<br>Rogue Survivor Spotted: 20/20
|ss4=Chore Dispatch SPD +2.8%<br>Spot Rogue Survivor once, Snail Rush +14<br>Rogue Survivor Spotted: 20/20
|ss5=Chore Dispatch SPD +3.6%<br>Spot Rogue Survivor once, snail RUSH +18<br>Rogue Survivor Spotted: 20/20
|ss7=Chore Dispatch SPD +3.6%<br>Spot Rogue Survivor once, Snail Rush +18<br>Rogue Survivor Spotted: 20/20<br>Chore Dispatch SPD +2.8% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill II.png|50px]] Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, 2x INTEL Drops +7.5%
|skill2=[[File:Murika skill II.png|50px]] Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, B-tads gained +7.5%
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Purple Relics]]
[[Category:FAME Relics]]
[[Category:Purple FAME Relics]]
[[Category:Chore Dispatch Speed Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration INTEL Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration B-tad Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Ancient Wood Boost]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by DNA Strength]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Rogue Survivor Spotted]]
